title: International travel and migration: September 2018 | Stats NZ
content:
## International travel and migration: September 2018
19 October 2018, 10:45am
International travel and migration statistics give the number of overseas visitors, New Zealand resident travellers, and permanent and long-term migrants entering or leaving New Zealand.
- International travel and migration: September 2018 Excel spreadsheet, 121 KB

### International travel and migration: September 2018
Excel spreadsheet, 121 KB
- International travel and migration: September 2018 – CSV ZIP compressed file, 156 KB

### International travel and migration: September 2018 – CSV
ZIP compressed file, 156 KB
In September 2018, visitor arrivals were up 5,400 to 258,200, compared with September 2017.
The biggest changes were in arrivals from:
- Australia (down 3,500)
- United States (up 1,800)
Monthly visitor arrivals, September 2008–18
Overseas trips by New Zealand residents were up 17,500 to 291,100. The biggest changes were in departures to:
- Australia (up 4,300)
- Indonesia (up 3,100)
- United States (up 2,900).
Monthly overseas trips by New Zealand residents, September 2008–18
Permanent and long-term arrivals were down 100 to 11,000.
Permanent and long-term departures were up 400 to 4,800.
Monthly net permanent and long-term migration, September 2008–18
Seasonally adjusted figures showed a net gain of 4,600 migrants in September 2018.
Seasonally adjusted monthly permanent and long-term migration, September 2008–18
In the September 2018 year (compared with the September 2017 year):
- visitor arrivals numbered 3.81 million, up 130,900 (4 percent)
- New Zealand residents departed on 3 million trips overseas, up 209,300 (7 percent)
- permanent and long-term arrivals were 129,000, down 2,600 (2 percent)
- permanent and long-term departures were 66,200, up 5,600 (9 percent)
- the net gain in migrants was 62,700, down 8,300 from the September 2017 year.
Use Infoshare to access time-series data for international travel and migration:
Subject category: Tourism Group: International travel and migration – ITM
Tourism and migration data visualiser is Stats NZ’s new online tool for tourism and migration figures. Use this tool to easily create simple graphs showing international travel trends.

## Definitions and metadata
International travel and migration – DataInfo+ gives general methodology used to produce international travel and migration statistics.
International travel and migration concepts – DataInfo+ gives definitions of terms used in this release.
